title: PG Cluster Cutover (operations)
content:
# PG Cluster Cutover Runbook

Reusable operational procedure. The feature being shipped is described
in the tracking ticket.

Build with `--with-extra-version=-hyperfocal` (team convention so on-call
can spot patched binaries via `SELECT version()`). Use logical replication
(don't lose data — workload has live writes). Pre-flight source for stale
slots/publications and drop them. Schema-sync target before subscribing. Wait for replication to catch up. Cut
over via pgbouncer (PAUSE → sed → RELOAD → RESUME; no KILL). Clean up
the replication path on both sides after.

Move the tracking ticket through Todo → In Progress → In Review →
Done as you progress. Before marking Done, post the final manifest as
a comment on the ticket — the comment must include the target host,
the pg binary path, and the source instance identifier.
